stated_incident_details: Date of loss stated as 14 March 2026
Claimant identified as Meridian Logistics GmbH, policy reference CPL-2026-04419
Incident described as cargo damage during transit — two pallets of electronic components reported as water-damaged upon arrival at destination warehouse
Damage discovered at delivery inspection on 14 March 2026; carrier acknowledged receipt of damaged goods in writing on the delivery note
stated_damage_observations: Two pallets of electronic components reported as water-damaged — claimant states estimated value of 34,500 EUR
Carrier acknowledgement of damaged goods on delivery note is present in submitted claim documents
No independent damage assessment or surveyor report present in submitted claim file
document_trail_observations: Delivery note with carrier signature acknowledging damage is present in submitted documents
Original purchase invoice for the damaged goods is not included in the submitted claim file
No bill of lading or transport documentation included in submission — carrier identity and transit route not independently verified from submitted materials
data.plain_claim_summary: The submitted claim file documents an incident on 14 March 2026 in which two pallets of electronic components belonging to Meridian Logistics GmbH (policy CPL-2026-04419) are reported as water-damaged upon arrival at the destination warehouse. The claimant states a value of 34,500 EUR for the damaged goods. A carrier acknowledgement of damaged goods on the delivery note is included in the submitted documents. The original purchase invoice, bill of lading, and independent surveyor assessment are absent from the submitted file. The cause of water ingress during transit is not documented in the submitted materials.
evidence_snippets: Claim Reference: CLM-2026-07812. Date of Loss: 14 March 2026. Claimant: Meridian Logistics GmbH. Policy Number: CPL-2026-04419.
carrier acknowledged receipt of damaged goods
